page_metadata.biotools__summary: FlowScatt is a tool to transform an ensamble of flow cytometry data experiment in a scattering dependent and non-dependent part. It enables volume-independent flow cytometry data by decoupling fluorescence from scattering.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FlowScatt is a tool to transform an ensamble of flow cytometry data experiment in a scattering dependent and non-dependent part. It enables volume-independent flow cytometry data by decoupling fluorescence from scattering.
